standards: Every record tests one specific rule, sign, decision, or driving judgment.
No answer may be made correct merely by its length, tone, or absolute wording.
Scenario questions state the road condition, traffic conflict, and requested action clearly.
Each explanation states both the rule and why the other action is unsafe or unlawful when useful.
Each graphic is instructional, includes accessible text, and is tied to a specific learning objective.

coverage.topic: Vehicle preparation, restraints, car seats, air bags
Basic driving: backing, lanes, parking, passing, signals, turns
Rules of road: freeways, intersections, markings, speed, roundabouts, controls
Alcohol, drugs, under-21 and Utah BAC law
Distraction, work zones, night, weather, mountain and rural driving
Crashes, emergencies, insurance and financial responsibility
Bicycles, emergency vehicles, trucks, motorcycles, pedestrians, railroads
